rulings.Case Title: CALIFORNIA UNION SQUARE L.P. VS. SAKS & COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 10, 2020 line 1. RESPONDENT SAKS & COMPANY LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees is continued to January 14, 2021. Opposing party is ordered to properly file its opposition. Opposition previously submitted for filing was rejected on November 5, 2020. The record does not reflect any attempts to re-file in accordance with the clerk's instructions. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Judgment Debtor Anne Kihagis Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax And Or Strike Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 10, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT ZORIALL LLC, ANNE KIHAGI Judgment Debtor Anne Kihagis Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax And Or Strike Costs is continued to January 15, 2020. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of opposition no later than December 21, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees As Costs Incurred 10162018 To 03062019 For Enforcement Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 10, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF DALE DUNCAN, MARTA MUNOZ MENDOZA Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees As Costs Incurred 10162018 To 03062019 For Enforcement Of Judgment is continued to January 15, 2020. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and reply no later than December 21, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TONY FU VS. DEMAS YAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 10, 2020 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT TONY FU DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to January 13, 2020 on Court's own motion. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LEGAL RECOVERY SERVICES VS. CRYSTAL LEI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 10, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT BRYANT FU, TING POON, CRYSTAL LEI DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is continued to January 13, 2020 on Court's own motion =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: QUINISHA KYREE ABRAM ET AL VS. ACRT, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 10, 2020 line 5. Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. The action is stayed as requested by the parties. Moving party may re-file its demurer, if necessary, upon termination of the stay. Moving party to prepare order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: OASIS GRILL, LLC ET AL VS. ERIC KETCHUM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION By Ketchum
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 10, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT ERIC KETCHUM MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION By Ketchum is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. Zapanta v. Universal Care, Inc. (2003) 107 Cal.App.4th 1167, 1172-73. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BENNETT HONG VS. RENE DEL PRADO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Vacate Judgment Based On Extrinsic Fraud, Lack Of Service For Trial; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Declaration Of Rene Del Prado, With Exhibits
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 10, 2020 line 7. DEFENDANT RENE PRADO Motion To Vacate Judgment Based On Extrinsic Fraud, Lack Of Service For Trial; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Declaration Of Rene Del Prado, With Exhibits is DENIED. Moving party failed to make a showing of extrinsic fraud. =(501/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: SALVADOR TANDOC VS. OSCAR AVILA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 10, 2020 line 8. DEFENDANT TAMARA PEREZ, RENE PEREZ, NESTOR HERNANDEZ DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. The Court previously provided an opportunity to amend to address the issues raised in the original demurrer. Amendments did not address those issues. =(501/CFH)
